title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 4–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Zoro, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eichiro ODA X Boichi

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I never thought...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That I'd get to meet you so soon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How futile.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The strongest swordsman in the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: VERSUS pirate Hunter zero...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's nobody in the world that can put up a fight against big bro!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell did that man do to our ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WHAT ARE YOU PLAYING AT?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only a foolish wild beast would use all their strength to hunt a mere rabbit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Although you may have some renown as a swords- man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are four seas separated by the Grand Line and Red Line,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And this is the weakest one, the East Blue.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: unfor- sunsetely, this is the smallest blade I've got.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There's a limit to how much...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can make a fool out of some- one...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You better not regret this when I kill you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: pitiful frog inside the well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I shall teach you the vastness of this world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: OMI...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GIR!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WHA...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 23 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
